response: Can you respond to this email? [Recipient Name], I was following up on your resume for the Administrative & Order Entry Specialist position with [Company Name], checking the best time for you to talk with us about the position via the phone to explain what we are looking for and if it matches what you are looking for in a position. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Thanks. If you have any more questions, please let me know. With best regards, [Sender Name], Vice President of Sales & Marketing North America.
